queries.q: Document the edge cases for the file upload feature before engineering starts
What boundary conditions and error states should we cover for bulk CSV import?
List everything that can go wrong in the checkout flow, with a recovery path for each
We keep getting burned by weird inputs in production; map the failure surface of the search feature
Prepare a QA catalog of unusual and failure scenarios for the scheduling feature
What happens at the limits for the cart: zero items, max items, expired sessions, concurrent edits? Enumerate them
Identify the race conditions and timeout scenarios we need to design for in the sync engine
Before launch, make sure every error state in onboarding has a designed message and recovery path
Review this PRD and enumerate the boundary and failure scenarios it does not cover
After last week's outage, build a systematic catalog of failure modes for the notifications pipeline
Write Given/When/Then acceptance criteria for the password reset story
queries.notes: Story-scoped GWT checks for handoff belong to the partner

queries.q: Add testable done conditions, including a couple of error scenarios, to this single user story for handoff
queries.notes: Error scenarios inside one story's criteria stay with acceptance criteria

queries.q: I need story-scoped pass/fail conditions for the export slice so QA can sign off
queries.notes: Done-ness for a slice, not the feature-wide failure catalog

queries.q: A production incident just happened; write up the lesson so future teams avoid repeating it
queries.notes: Banking the learning comes first; the catalog gets updated after

queries.q: Build the pre-launch checklist covering support, legal, and marketing readiness
queries.notes: Launch readiness coordination, not failure analysis

queries.q: Break the reporting feature into user stories for the next two sprints
Write the PRD for the document signing feature
queries.notes: Feature not specified enough yet to enumerate inputs and limits

queries.q: Fix this flaky Jest test that fails intermittently in CI
Write a SQL query that finds orders with negative totals
Suggest a birthday gift for my 8 year old nephew
